project1.name: User Registration and Login System
project1.description: <1>Description: </1>User registration and login system with form validation and secure authentication, including password encryption, email confirmation, and password recovery functionality. Protected routes and full front-end and back-end integration, simulating a real-world authentication flow.

project2.name: Elaine TavaresWeb' Portfolio
project2.description: <1>Description: </1> Responsive SPA portfolio built with React on the front end and integrated with a PHP/MySQL backend. Includes a fully functional form with validation, database storage, and automatic user feedback after submission.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a <1>Front-End Developer</1> transitioning into the tech field, building my career with a focus on functional, well-structured interfaces and strong user experience. My background in <2>Financial Management</2> and my current studies in <3>Internet Systems Technology</3> have given me a more practical and analytical approach to developing solutions.
about.paragraph2: I work with <1>React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS</1>, prioritizing clean code, responsiveness, and <2>API integration</2>. I also have knowledge of <3>PHP</3> and <4>MySQL</4>, which allows me to explore backend development as well.
about.paragraph3: Throughout my studies, I have developed personal, <1>freelance</1>, and <2>volunteer</2> projects. These experiences strengthened my organization, autonomy, version control skills with <3>Git/GitHub</3>, and my sense of responsibility toward delivering high-quality work.
about.paragraph4: I am consolidating my career in Front-End development (while also exploring backend technologies) and seeking opportunities where I can continue growing technically and create real impact through what I build.
